layout_strategies.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl md:max-w-lg md:border-x md:border-border

FloorCard.styles: aspect-square flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer text-2xl font-bold hover:bg-slate-50

BlockCard.styles: aspect-[4/3] flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:border-primary/20 transition-all cursor-pointer
BlockCard.rating_indicator: w-2 h-2 rounded-full absolute top-2 right-2

RoomRating.item_styles: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border transition-all cursor-pointer

TransportWidget.styles: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-border shadow-sm
TransportWidget.badge_styles: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Typography: Add the font imports to index.css immediately. Configure tailwind.config.js to use 'Clash Display' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
3. Layout: The app is a Telegram Web App. Wrap the main content in a container with 'max-w-md mx-auto' to simulate mobile view on desktop and constrain width.
4. Navigation: Implement a custom TabBar or BottomSheet for navigation if needed, but primarily use a stack-based navigation (Floor -> Block -> Room).
5. State Management: Use React Context or Zustand for holding the current 'floor', 'block', and 'user' state.
6. Admin Panel: Create a separate route '/admin' protected by a PIN or password. Use a table component for the student list.
7. PDF Export: Implement 'jspdf-autotable' in the Admin panel to export inspection logs.
8. Transport: Mock the API for now, or use a placeholder list with real-time countdown logic.
9. Theme: Enforce the 'light' theme variables in index.css. Do not support dark mode for now to ensure consistency with the 'Sanitary' clean look.
10. Components: Use Shadcn UI components (Card, Button, Input, Select, Table, Dialog, Form) but styling them with the 'rounded-2xl' and 'border-border' tokens defined above.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'cursor-pointer' and 'data-testid'.
For the rating logic (1-5): 1-3 is RED (bg-red-50 text-red-600 border-red-200), 4-5 is GREEN (bg-green-50 text-green-600 border-green-200).
Respect the 'Telegram Web App' context - back button should be handled via the Telegram SDK or a custom back button in the top left.
